blocks.text:
Be careful with attachment , not gonna be scared
of it, though it teaches what armor you need to put on. 
maybe dont need armor could be a berserker style. 
I feel good now that i can write things down. 
 she wants to pick up her random shirt 
stuff which i find unnecessary. ill have grandma verr hand it off maybe.. 
cant risk falling back in drod. but deep down i love the idea of us together. 
im not gonna feel bad anymore though I want to make the best creations. slug said theres love in the stories thats helped me get through this. Im starting to feel really full of gratitude all of a sudden. like a passed one of gods trials.

Rumination (rune-immitation) involves repetitive thinking or dwelling on negative feelings and distress and their causes and consequences. This is important to recognize because i almost stayed in a loop of this for a long time. i call that the dungeon, you know how to beat the dungeon

She said she misses me. What am I supposed to feel. 

I showed a bad part of myself. drod


I’m more embarrassed of myself than anything. drod

I finally get the closure .drod

Only for it to reopen .drod

Why should my mistakes overwrite yours. drod



Or is it all just a ploy for a freedom game.  

so shaken that we can actually experience being in love
i thought i only loved the dungeon
How could I be such a hypocrite drod man
to tell someone to grow up... swordahl would kill me for that
I dont regret it because i diddnt mean it in my heart.
